subcodes.first_line: O illustrious Friend! He declareth and beareth witness to thy recognition, thy devotion, thy firm attachment and thy steadfast adherence to His hem [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا خلیل جلیل میفرماید و شهادت میدهد بر اقبال و توجه و تمسک و تشبث آنجناب بذیل
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @prayer for assistance; intercession, @spiritual transformation
